title: ClientState
description: Structured LLM analysis output for a single client sweep. All properties required; nullable fields use anyOf with null.

clientName.description: Client Discord channel name, exactly as provided

context.description: 1-2 short bullets summarising the most recent relevant facts (current state only; omit resolved items)

status.description: Short narrative sentence(s) describing the current situation — NOT an enum or label

next.description: Owner → concrete action(s). Must name a real person and a specific task.

teamChatter.description: Brief note on relevant team chat mentions if they affect current state, otherwise null

risk.description: Brief risk note (churn, escalation, access loss) if genuinely present, otherwise null

needsManualReview.description: True if situation was unclear after reading all messages and a human should verify

reviewNote.description: Explanation of what is unclear, required when needsManualReview is true, otherwise null
